scripts.lint:mvp: pnpm --filter @gymflow/web exec eslint src --max-warnings 0 && pnpm --filter @gymflow/api run lint:check
scripts.typecheck:mvp: pnpm --filter @gymflow/web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @gymflow/api exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test:mvp: pnpm --filter @gymflow/web run test && pnpm --filter @gymflow/api run test
scripts.build:mvp: pnpm --filter @gymflow/web run build && pnpm --filter @gymflow/api run build
scripts.prisma:validate:mvp: sh -c 'cd apps/api && DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://127.0.0.1:5432/_prisma_validate}" pnpm exec prisma validate'
scripts.validate:mvp: pnpm lint:mvp && pnpm typecheck:mvp && pnpm test:mvp && pnpm build:mvp && pnpm prisma:validate:mvp && pnpm --filter @gymflow/api run db:sanity
scripts.validate:mvp:no-db: pnpm lint:mvp && pnpm typecheck:mvp && pnpm test:mvp && pnpm build:mvp && pnpm prisma:validate:mvp
